title: Project Miner Temp Power Standing Blocker Authority And First Approval Row Execution
objective: Record the current stakeholder authority to clear PM-lane blocker approvals along the predetermined framework, then execute exactly one first approval-record persistence row for the current hosted Temp Power import candidate with one same-payload idempotent replay and no project import.
active_role: VS Code Codex Technical Repo Authority / PM Stakeholder Delegate / Approval Row Executor

source_floor.meaning: PM Lane 276 Render executor return accepted; hosted mutation-seam serves the Temp Power snapshot and approval status is no_approval_record.

stakeholder_authority.summary: Jason instructed Codex to move forward with authority for approval of all blocker items that allows work on the predetermined PM lane framework and path end-to-end without stopping for approval at each step as repo technical authority and project stakeholder.
stakeholder_authority.bounded_interpretation: This packet admits the next predetermined PM blocker only: first approval-row persistence for the current hosted Temp Power candidate. Later import and downstream writes require their own bounded packet but do not require a separate chat approval if they stay inside the standing authority and validation path.

payload_requirements.review_notes: Stakeholder/PM authority on 2026-05-18 admits first approval-row persistence for the current Temp Power candidate, accepts PROJECT_DATA_ENTRY_FORMULA_ERRORS as reviewed non-blocking warning context for a later import packet, and keeps project import plus downstream field/schedule/resource/customer/production/finance writes blocked.

preflight_requirements: deployed mutation-seam smoke with PM intake RESULT PASS
paired PM intake hosted smoke PM_INTAKE_HOSTED_SUMMARY failed=0
hosted candidate readback matches pm-import-candidate-miner-temp-power and expected counts/fingerprints
approval status readback reports no_approval_record and approval_record_count_for_candidate=0
downstream accessible counts are captured before the write
post_write_requirements: first POST returns entity_type pm_import_candidate_approval and action_type persist_import_approval
approval status readback returns approved_for_import_packet and approval_record_count_for_candidate=1
not_allowed: No workpackage, task, apparatus, source-trace, warning-review, assignment, schedule, status, field record, production tracking, customer report, billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, or external finance-system write.
No direct SQL insertion for the approval row.
No Render, Vercel, Supabase, Olares, DNS, auth, ingress, or new service change.
No source workbook or PDF content edit or writeback.
